name: Fiesta Onion Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 Jumbo Vidalia onion, chopped (with green tops if in-season)
2 medium Vidalia onion, chopped (with green tops if in-season)
1 large Tomato, peeled or chopped (or 2 medium Tomatoes, peeled or chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped onion, black olives, green chili peppers, tomato, olive oil, wine vinegar, cumin, Worcestershire sauce, and Tabasco sauce in a bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as needed.
4. Cover the bowl and chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
5. Serve chilled with corn chips.
